project: The Crown Journal Reel 1 - Brunson Smoke
motion: Static crown/fitted/concrete visual with animated waveform bars only.

cards.text: Heavy is the crown, but he wore it like a fitted.
This is not L.A. / This is not Miami. / This is not Boston.
The Garden can smell fear before the ball hits the rim.
As a Knicks fan, it seemed like they were afraid.
They wanted New York's lights. / They did not want New York's smoke.
Read or listen to the full essay. / Heavy Is The Crown. Brunson Wanted The Smoke. / journal.kaliartistry.com
